disambiguating_questions: Does the self-start button make any sound at all?
Are the headlight and indicators working when you turn the key?
Did you check if there's fuel in the tank?

causes.name: Dead battery
causes.fix: Try kick-start. If it starts, the battery needs charging or replacing.

causes.name: No fuel
causes.fix: Refuel. If it still doesn't start, check the fuel line for blockage.

causes.name: Spark plug fouled
causes.fix: Clean or replace the spark plug.

causes.name: Carburetor choked
causes.fix: Carburetor cleaning needed at a mechanic.

embedding_text: Bike or scooter won't start, no crank, dead, self-start not working, kick start also fails sometimes. Common causes: dead battery, no fuel, fouled spark plug, choked carburetor.

disambiguating_questions: Is it a knocking/tapping sound or a grinding sound?
Does the noise happen only when accelerating, or all the time?
When did you last change the engine oil?

causes.name: Low or old engine oil
causes.fix: Top up or change the engine oil.

causes.name: Loose chain
causes.fix: Get the chain tensioned and lubricated.

causes.name: Worn out clutch plates
causes.fix: Clutch plate replacement needed at a mechanic.

embedding_text: Strange noise from engine, knocking, grinding, rattling, tapping sound while riding or accelerating. Common causes: low or old engine oil, loose chain, worn clutch plates.

symptom: Brakes feel weak or not stopping properly
disambiguating_questions: Is it the front brake, rear brake, or both that feel weak?
Does the brake lever or pedal feel spongy/soft when pressed?
Have you noticed any fluid leaking near the brake area (if disc brake)?

causes.name: Worn brake pads/shoes
causes.fix: Brake pads or shoes need replacement. Do not ride until fixed.

causes.name: Air in brake line or low brake fluid (disc brake)
causes.fix: Brake fluid top-up or bleeding required at a mechanic immediately.

causes.name: Loose brake cable (drum brake)
causes.fix: Brake cable adjustment needed.

embedding_text: Brakes feel weak, not stopping properly, spongy brake lever, long braking distance, front or rear brake issue. Safety critical issue requiring immediate mechanic attention.

disambiguating_questions: Has your riding style or traffic conditions changed recently?
When did you last service the bike or clean the air filter?
Are the tires properly inflated?

causes.name: Dirty air filter
causes.fix: Clean or replace the air filter.

causes.name: Under-inflated tires
causes.fix: Inflate tires to the recommended PSI.

causes.name: Carburetor needs tuning
causes.fix: Carburetor tuning/cleaning at a mechanic.

embedding_text: Mileage dropped suddenly, fuel efficiency low, consuming more petrol than usual. Common causes: dirty air filter, under-inflated tires, carburetor needs tuning.

disambiguating_questions: What color is the smoke — white/blue, black, or grey?
Does the smoke happen all the time or only at startup?
Have you noticed any burning smell along with the smoke?

causes.name: Engine burning oil (white/blue smoke)
causes.fix: Likely worn piston rings or seals — needs mechanic inspection immediately.

causes.name: Rich fuel mixture (black smoke)
causes.fix: Carburetor or fuel-air mixture needs adjustment at a mechanic.

embedding_text: Smoke coming from exhaust or silencer, white blue smoke, black smoke, burning smell. Engine related issue requiring mechanic inspection.

disambiguating_questions: Does the engine crank after the clicking sound or only click once?
Are the headlight and horn weak when the key is on?
Does the bike start with kick-start?

causes.name: Weak battery
causes.fix: Recharge the battery first. If the issue returns, replace the battery.

causes.name: Loose or corroded battery terminals
causes.fix: Clean and tighten the battery terminals.

causes.name: Faulty starter relay
causes.fix: Starter relay may need replacement.

embedding_text: Self-start makes clicking sound, starter click but engine not cranking, weak horn and headlight. Common causes: weak battery, loose battery terminals, starter relay fault.

disambiguating_questions: Does it start again immediately after stopping?
Does it stop more often at low speed or traffic signals?
Was the fuel level low when this happened?

causes.name: Fuel flow issue
causes.fix: Check fuel level, fuel pipe, and fuel filter for blockage.

causes.name: Dirty carburetor
causes.fix: Carburetor cleaning and tuning needed.

causes.name: Faulty spark plug
causes.fix: Clean or replace the spark plug.

causes.name: Idle RPM too low
causes.fix: Idle RPM adjustment needed at a mechanic.

embedding_text: Bike or scooter stops while riding, engine shuts off suddenly, engine dies at signal or low speed. Common causes: fuel flow issue, dirty carburetor, spark plug fault, low idle RPM.

symptom: Engine stops at traffic signal or idle
disambiguating_questions: Does the engine stop only when you release the accelerator?
Does it happen after the engine warms up?
When was the last carburetor or throttle body cleaning done?

causes.name: Idle RPM setting too low
causes.fix: Adjust idle RPM so the engine can stay running without throttle.

causes.name: Dirty carburetor or throttle body
causes.fix: Cleaning and tuning required.

causes.name: Clogged air filter
causes.fix: Clean or replace the air filter.

embedding_text: Engine stops at traffic signal, bike stalls at idle, low RPM issue, engine turns off when accelerator is released. Common causes: idle RPM low, dirty carburetor, clogged air filter.

disambiguating_questions: Does the engine rev but the vehicle does not gain speed properly?
Is the issue worse with a pillion rider or uphill?
When was the last service done?

causes.name: Dirty air filter
causes.fix: Clean or replace the air filter.

causes.name: Worn clutch plates
causes.fix: Clutch plates may need replacement.

causes.name: Carburetor tuning issue
causes.fix: Fuel-air mixture and carburetor tuning needed.

causes.name: Low tire pressure
causes.fix: Inflate tires to recommended PSI.

embedding_text: Poor pickup, low pickup, slow acceleration, power loss, bike feels heavy while accelerating. Common causes: dirty air filter, worn clutch plates, carburetor tuning issue, low tire pressure.

symptom: Bike vibrates too much while riding
disambiguating_questions: Do you feel vibration mainly in the handle, seat, or footrest?
Does it happen only at high speed?
Did the issue start after a puncture repair or tire change?

causes.name: Loose engine mounting bolts
causes.fix: Bolts need inspection and tightening.

causes.name: Wheel balancing or alignment issue
causes.fix: Wheel inspection, balancing, or alignment needed.

causes.name: Worn tire or uneven tire pressure
causes.fix: Correct tire pressure or replace worn tire.

causes.name: Loose handle cone set
causes.fix: Handle cone set adjustment or replacement needed.

embedding_text: Bike vibrates too much while riding, handle vibration, scooter shaking, vibration at high speed. Common causes: loose engine mounting, wheel balancing issue, worn tire, loose handle cone set.

disambiguating_questions: Is the noise a loose rattling sound or a dry rubbing sound?
Does the sound increase while accelerating?
When was the chain last lubricated or tightened?

causes.name: Loose chain
causes.fix: Get chain slack adjusted to the correct level.

causes.name: Dry chain
causes.fix: Clean and lubricate the chain.

causes.name: Worn chain sprocket set
causes.fix: Replace chain and sprocket kit.

embedding_text: Bike chain makes noise, chain loose, dry chain sound, khat khat noise while riding or accelerating. Common causes: loose chain, dry chain, worn chain sprocket set.

disambiguating_questions: Is the gear hard only when the engine is running?
Is neutral difficult to find?
Does the clutch lever feel too tight or too loose?

causes.name: Clutch cable adjustment issue
causes.fix: Adjust clutch free play properly.

causes.name: Old engine oil
causes.fix: Change engine oil with the recommended grade.

causes.name: Worn clutch plates
causes.fix: Clutch plate inspection and replacement may be needed.

embedding_text: Gear shifting is hard, gear tight, gear stuck, neutral difficult to find, clutch lever issue. Common causes: clutch cable adjustment, old engine oil, worn clutch plates.

disambiguating_questions: Does the clutch lever feel hard from the start or only after riding for some time?
Is the clutch cable old or rusty?
Does gear shifting also feel hard?

causes.name: Dry or rusty clutch cable
causes.fix: Lubricate the clutch cable or replace it if damaged.

causes.name: Incorrect clutch free play
causes.fix: Adjust clutch lever free play.

causes.name: Worn clutch assembly
causes.fix: Mechanic inspection needed if cable adjustment does not help.

embedding_text: Clutch feels tight, hard clutch lever, hand pain while pressing clutch, clutch cable issue. Common causes: dry clutch cable, incorrect free play, worn clutch assembly.

symptom: Scooter makes belt or CVT noise
disambiguating_questions: Does the noise come when accelerating from low speed?
Does the scooter feel jerky while moving?
How many kilometers has the scooter run?

causes.name: Worn CVT belt
causes.fix: CVT belt inspection and replacement may be needed.

causes.name: Dirty CVT rollers or clutch
causes.fix: CVT cleaning and inspection required.

causes.name: Worn clutch shoes
causes.fix: Clutch shoe replacement may be needed.

embedding_text: Scooter makes belt noise, CVT noise, Activa acceleration noise, jerky scooter movement, belt slipping. Common causes: worn CVT belt, dirty rollers, worn clutch shoes.

disambiguating_questions: Is only the headlight not working or all lights are off?
Does high beam work but low beam does not?
Did the issue start after rain or washing?

causes.name: Fused headlight bulb
causes.fix: Replace the headlight bulb.

causes.name: Loose wiring or connector
causes.fix: Wiring connector inspection and tightening needed.

causes.name: Weak battery or charging issue
causes.fix: Battery and charging system should be checked.

causes.name: Faulty switch
causes.fix: Headlight switch may need cleaning or replacement.

embedding_text: Headlight not working, dim headlight, low beam high beam issue, bike light not working. Common causes: fused bulb, loose wiring, weak battery, faulty switch.

disambiguating_questions: Is the horn completely silent or just weak?
Are the lights and indicators working normally?
Did this happen after rain or washing?

causes.name: Loose horn wire
causes.fix: Horn wiring connection needs tightening.

causes.name: Weak battery
causes.fix: Recharge or test the battery.

causes.name: Faulty horn unit
causes.fix: Replace the horn.

causes.name: Faulty horn switch
causes.fix: Switch cleaning or replacement required.

embedding_text: Horn not working, weak horn, horn sound low, no horn sound. Common causes: loose wire, weak battery, faulty horn unit, faulty horn switch.

disambiguating_questions: Does the battery drain overnight or after a few days?
Have you added extra lights, phone charger, or accessories?
Does the battery charge properly while riding?

causes.name: Old or weak battery
causes.fix: Battery replacement may be needed if it cannot hold charge.

causes.name: Charging coil or regulator issue
causes.fix: Charging system inspection needed.

causes.name: Electrical accessory draining battery
causes.fix: Remove or rewire extra accessories properly.

causes.name: Loose battery terminals
causes.fix: Clean and tighten battery terminals.

embedding_text: Battery drains quickly, battery dead again, new battery discharged, battery not holding charge. Common causes: old battery, charging coil issue, regulator issue, extra accessory drain, loose terminals.

symptom: Petrol smell near bike or scooter
disambiguating_questions: Can you see petrol dripping anywhere?
Is the smell stronger after filling fuel?
Is the smell coming near the tank, carburetor, or engine area?

causes.name: Fuel pipe leakage
causes.fix: Do not ride. Fuel pipe needs inspection or replacement immediately.

causes.name: Loose fuel cap or overflow
causes.fix: Check fuel cap seal and avoid overfilling.

causes.name: Carburetor overflow
causes.fix: Carburetor float or fuel line inspection needed.

embedding_text: Petrol smell near bike or scooter, fuel smell, fuel leak, petrol leaking, smell near tank or carburetor. Safety issue requiring mechanic inspection.

disambiguating_questions: Does the tyre become flat quickly or slowly over days?
Is it a tubeless tyre or tube tyre?
Did the issue start after hitting a pothole?

causes.name: Small puncture
causes.fix: Puncture repair needed.

causes.name: Leaking valve
causes.fix: Valve replacement needed.

causes.name: Bent rim or bead leak
causes.fix: Rim inspection and repair needed.

causes.name: Worn tyre
causes.fix: Tyre replacement may be required.

embedding_text: Tyre loses air repeatedly, slow puncture, air pressure low, tubeless tyre leak, valve leak. Common causes: small puncture, leaking valve, bent rim, worn tyre.

disambiguating_questions: Does it pull left or right when you leave the handle slightly?
Did the bike recently fall or hit a pothole?
Is the tyre pressure equal on both tyres?

causes.name: Unequal tyre pressure
causes.fix: Set both tyres to recommended pressure.

causes.name: Wheel alignment issue
causes.fix: Wheel alignment or fork inspection needed.

causes.name: Bent handle or fork
causes.fix: Mechanic inspection needed after fall or accident.

causes.name: Brake drag on one wheel
causes.fix: Brake adjustment or caliper cleaning needed.

embedding_text: Bike pulls to one side, going left or right, handle not straight, alignment issue after fall or pothole. Common causes: unequal tyre pressure, wheel alignment, bent fork, brake drag.

disambiguating_questions: Does the engine feel hotter than usual after a short ride?
Is there any burning smell or smoke?
When was the engine oil last changed?

causes.name: Low or old engine oil
causes.fix: Stop riding for now. Check oil level and change engine oil if needed.

causes.name: Blocked air flow or dirty engine fins
causes.fix: Clean dirt/mud around engine cooling fins.

causes.name: Engine running lean
causes.fix: Carburetor or fuel-air mixture tuning needed.

causes.name: Internal engine issue
causes.fix: Mechanic inspection required if overheating continues.

embedding_text: Engine overheating, engine too hot, burning smell, heat from engine after short ride. Common causes: low engine oil, blocked air flow, lean fuel mixture, internal engine issue.
